settings.label: Configure page (optional)
settings.info: Optional. Buy buttons use the Kevin product URL with ?view=configure when product_buy is set. Or create a Page with handle "configure" and template "configure".

settings.content: Required: Assign Kevin (buy) product below with Color variants. Optional: Kevin+ with monthly selling plan. Without products, configure preview works but checkout will not. Create a Page with handle "llms" and template "llms" for AI crawler summary at /pages/llms.

Multi-language: config/languages.json is the registry. Run node scripts/build-locales.mjs, node scripts/translate-locales.mjs (DEEPL_API_KEY), then ./scripts/activate-locales.sh for Shopify locales, market URLs, and Admin translations. Theme strings live in locales/*.json.
Settings → Checkout → Customize: logo, accent #0071e3, background #fbfbfd. Enable Shop Pay, Apple Pay, Google Pay. Add shipping zones (EU free shipping). Link return, privacy, and warranty policies.
Markets: set Switzerland/EU as needed for CHF pricing. Abandoned checkout: enable Shopify Email or Klaviyo in admin.
Homepage and section text: use Customize and switch language (EN / NL / FR / DE / CS) before editing. Logo and favicon below are the same for all languages.
Navigation menus: Online Store → Navigation, or run npm run cms:navigation from the theme repo. See docs/CONTENT-TEAM-GUIDE.md.

settings.label: Logo
settings.info: Optional. Same for all languages. Leave empty to use the default KEVIN wordmark.

settings.label: Favicon
settings.info: Same for all languages. Square PNG recommended.

settings.label: Default Open Graph image
settings.info: Used when a page has no featured image. Falls back to the hero device image URL if empty.
